privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a Power BI Desktop report from sales_data.csv containing 1000 records. The data includes Sales_Amount (range 100.12-9989.04, average 5019.27), Payment_Method (Bank Transfer, Cash, Credit Card), and Sales_Channel (Online, Retail). Required outputs include: a calculated column Revenue_Band (Low <100, Medium 100-499, High >=500), two DAX measures (Avg_Sale and Order_Count), a renamed page named 'Channel Analysis', and two visuals (lineClusteredColumnComboChart and treemap). The data is synthetic with no records in the Low band and 95.7% of records in the High band.
